name: WF-022 Provider Packet Bridge Canonical
description: Build provider-safe packet envelopes from approved internal packets with auth/replay metadata.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { workflow_id: 'WF-022', provider_target: $json.provider_target || 'local_stub', approved_packet: $json.approved_packet || {}, dossier_id: $json.dossier_id || null, route_id: $json.route_id || 'ROUTE_PHASE1_STANDARD', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];

meta.purpose: Execute deterministic workflow WF-022 with governance-bound routing.
